name: Karen's Egg Bread
recipeIngredient: 10 cups Flour (or as little as 8 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the yeast with water and sugar.
2. Add oil to the yeast mixture.
3. Dissolve additional sugar in separate bowl.
4. Gradually add sugar solution to yeast mixture.
5. Stir in salt, eggs, flour (or less), and egg white.
6. Form dough into four loaves.
7. Brush loaves with egg white and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
8. Allow the dough to rise twice.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
